title: AP Inter 1st, 2nd year result date: BIEAP to release IPE results on April 15 at 10.31am
description: Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh (BIEAP) will release AP Inter 1st and 2nd year results 2026 on April 15 at 10:31 AM. Over 10.57 lakh students appeared for IPE March exams. Results will be available on resultsbie.ap.gov.in and via Mana Mitra WhatsApp service. The marks memo will include subject-wise scores and grades. Students can apply for recounting, while supplementary and improvement exams will be offered for those who need them or seek better scores respectively online.

He had pre-informed her he cannot do handshakes due to religious beliefs, and her instinctive resignation gesture caused confusion. She urged social media not to blame him. Similar past incidents exist with Vaishali Rameshbabu. Harika stressed mutual respect and focus on chess, despite controversy overshadowing results.

description: Aditya Dhar’s espionage magnum opus, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its unprecedented box office reign on Day 27. Having already made history as the first Hindi film to breach the Rs 1,000 crore India net milestone, the Ranveer Singh-starrer is now closing in on the Rs 1,100 crore domestic landmark. Despite the 2026 IPL season, the film's global footprint has expanded to a staggering Rs 1,718 crore. Stay updated with live tracking, weekly breakdowns, and day-wise earnings of this cinematic phenomenon.

title: Noida protest: Police flag QR code-based WhatsApp 'syndicate', 7 FIRs filed, over 300 held
description: Following violent clashes over wage demands, Noida saw heavy police presence and route marches as investigators flagged a possible organized WhatsApp syndicate. title: 2 baraats reach venue for one bride in UP, cops ask woman to choose one
description: A wedding in Amroha faced chaos when two groom processions arrived for the same bride. The bride's family had cancelled a prior engagement and quickly arranged a new wedding for the same day. Police intervened, and the bride chose the groom from Sambhal, leading to the completion of that nikah while the other procession was sent back.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
description: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.
